notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the mysql SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 49 CVEs: CVE-2025-21490, CVE-2024-11053, CVE-2024-21193, CVE-2024-21194, CVE-2024-21196, and 44 more.
